1542350.name: Betaverse
1542350.description:
Betaverse is a rather unique (in a way you wish didn't exist) digital experience, a network of 3D virtual worlds created by Microtaur's troubled imagination. Play free with your friends and change the world around you in this not-so-intelligent indie MMO sandbox.

Features


  • 🗺️ Explore the world and interact with other players connected to the single server.
  • 🔨 Claim a piece of terrain and customize it with flexible building tools.
  • 🗡️ Participate in various PVP tournaments multiple designated arenas.
  • 👖 Obtain swaggy stuff to stand out from the crowd.
1542350.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
